challenge: Support a fast-moving blockchain infrastructure platform on GKE while improving deployment safety, delivery speed, and stateful system resilience across multiple environments.
actions: Cut config-only PR deployment time from roughly 17 to 27 minutes down to about 2 minutes using GitHub Actions path filtering and registry-level image retagging.
Unified promotion flow across BM and trunk environments with Kargo, reducing drift between pre-production and release paths.
Hardened the platform after a state loss incident by adding PVC-backed persistence and anti-affinity rules for co-located Redis, Minio, and routing components.
Rolled out GitOps access control with Dex, Google Groups, and Terraform so ArgoCD access no longer depended on shared credentials.
Contributed to cert-manager and mTLS validation under aggressive certificate rotation, surfacing operational limits before rollout.
results: 93% faster config-only deploys for PR workflows
Safer promotions with more accurate deployment tracking and notifications
Improved stateful workload survivability during node churn and pod rescheduling

challenge: Modernize legacy infrastructure operations in a regulated banking environment while reducing manual effort, accelerating provisioning, and maintaining compliance posture.
actions: Automated more than 200 server migrations with shell tooling and Python services, replacing fragile manual steps with repeatable workflows.
Built Airflow and Python compliance pipelines for PCI-DSS checks and post-migration validation across cloud perimeters.
Created GitOps provisioning workflows that reduced IaaS provisioning time from about 2 hours to 25 minutes.
Implemented right-sizing automation and observability rollout across AWS and GCP estates.
results: Provisioning time reduced from 2 hours to 25 minutes
25% cloud cost reduction through automated rightsizing
